description_long: This object is a set of four urban-style respirator helmets, each featuring a robust face mask with dual cylindrical filter canisters on either side. The helmets have a prominent, wraparound visor that covers the eyes and nose, with adjustable head straps for a secure fit. Each helmet displays a unique front design: one is plain with an orange nose bridge, another has a stylized shark mouth graphic, a third is plain gray, and the fourth features a white and red color scheme with red trim. The filter canisters are large and black, attached symmetrically to the lower sides of the mask. The overall construction appears to be a combination of hard plastic, rubber, and transparent polycarbonate for the visor, with visible stitching and strap adjustment points. The helmets are designed for personal protection in urban environments, likely for filtering airborne particles or hazardous substances.
description: A set of four urban respirator helmets with dual side filters, wraparound visors, and unique front designs including plain, shark mouth, and red-trimmed styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four helmets' visors, filter canisters, and distinctive faceplate designs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the filter canisters and the profile of the visors and head straps.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the head straps' arrangement and the overall width of the helmets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the symmetry of the filter canisters and the side profile of the faceplates.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two large circular filter canisters on each side of the mask, with vertical slits on the front mouth area for additional airflow.
attribute_graphic_design: Each helmet features a unique design: one with a solid orange nose bridge, one with a stylized shark mouth motif, one plain gray, and one with a white and red color scheme and red trim.
